summary: References channels from any CHOP in the project by path, with optional channel name filtering. Essential for routing data between components.

key_params.name: chop
key_params.note: Path to the source CHOP to reference

key_params.name: channames
key_params.note: Whitespace-separated channel name patterns to select (supports wildcards)

common_gotchas: If the referenced CHOP is deleted or the path changes, the Select outputs zero channels silently.
Channel name patterns are case-sensitive — 'tx' will not match 'TX'.
